__rationale__: Passing fixture for MR-60: yeast two-hybrid marker compatibility. Construct uses an AH109 host with the canonical bait (TRP1) + prey (LEU2) plasmid marker pair — neither collides with the HIS3 / ADE2 / MEL1 / lacZ chromosomal reporter cassette. v0.2 stub returns INFO.

construct.notes: T-414 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage for MR-60. Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations (plasmid markers vs host.expression_features Y2H reporter cassette set).
